Falling Sun is a nice wheel for your Pandia or Wanda
at S3 it’s a 20% increase in crit, critdmg, poison and retaliate

Birth of a soul is outstanding on Nautila or Celeste
Increase the team max hp
More reliable heal for Celeste and more shield for Nautila
Realm mastery main stat is amazing for Celeste passive

Spring of Akut is amazing for Silver charge type support like Thais, Ramona and Hameln, even Aigis
A passive aliemus and silver charge are always good

It’s very worth to grab a wheel from BP
But you don’t really need these to play the game
You can just follow a friend who has these wheels

Blue Faction has the most versatile and easy to pick up teams
I DID IT

so there's a few factions in this game
**Chaos (Yellow) Faction** is the base which you can use these character in any faction
there's also 3 other Factions that can't be together
**Aequor (Blue) Faction** is the best to pick up because they have the best early game standard characters, they specialize in doing tentacle damage after each turn ends and you can manipulate the damage by using cards from that faction, it can also give you shield and more damage depending on what stance you're in (you'll learn it after you try it)
**Caro (Red) Faction** is mainly using speciality card that linked to their characters that can result in many various effects, they also have this ball of hp that will refilled after the end of turn that you can use to heal yourself, tho it can be used on other things
**Ultra (Purple) Faction** is hard to learn and tricky to use, they have a special deck which can be filled by using the first card in the turn, or by using cards from this factions, after 5 cards filled in the deck, you can end turn and use that special deck to do more things(i currently aren't familiar with this so <:Dead:1034476628081901638> )
uh
this is based on my experience so please correct me if i'm wrong
oh and check the interlude drill where they have trial for each standard banner you can try yourself
you get 25 standard pulls from this
and you get to try which one to your liking
tho have to note that the trial has 1 or 2 character in the team, where usually you need 4 character to make a team
Chaos is yellow tho...
HAH
OMG SORRY I'M COLOR BLIND 😭

there is a 2x speed button in the bottom left corner near posse button (a lot of people miss it somehow)
in the same vein there are barely visible right/left arrows on the edify reward windows that you can use to collect those rewards faster when you edify same unit multiple times in a row
in settings there is an auto-dismantle for R wheels (after you get enough of them to +12 a single copy). there is no endgame content that allows wheel dupes so there is no downside to doing that

gold shop is actually insane and you should be buying mats there instead of farming them
it's actually better to farm gold in standard stage and then buy mats than to farm mats directly

main endgame pve mode requires you to have 5 teams. dupes of characters, wheels and posses are not allowed so plan your account accordingly. Mixed with chaos, each faction standard banner gives you enough to make poison, retaliate and a hit damage based teams. 

There is little to no reason not to sell a card in each shop during explorations. Standard attack/defence cards sell for 30, character specific cards sell for 50. There is value in units that have bad cards (see Ramona's 3 cost nuke for an example of a very sellable card).
